title: claude-ads audit history index
description: Shape of ~/.claude-ads/history/index.json — a summary log of every audit ever run, in chronological order. Full per-audit JSON snapshots live alongside as ~/.claude-ads/history/<platform>-<YYYYMMDDhhmmss>.json (each conforms to ads/references/audit-output-schema.json). /ads next uses this index to detect regressions, surface trends, and rank Quick Wins by recency.

audits.description: Chronologically ordered (oldest first). Append-only — /ads start reset clears the whole file.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the audit completed.

health_score.description: Overall health score reported by the audit-* agent.

data_source.description: Which tier produced the data for this audit (matches audit-output-schema.json data_source field).

file.description: Relative filename of the full audit JSON snapshot inside ~/.claude-ads/history/. Format: <platform>-<YYYYMMDDhhmmss[ffffff]>.json (microseconds appended to disambiguate same-second saves).
